messages.locale.label: Language

messages.repository.setup.title: CDDA Launcher
messages.repository.setup.description: Select a folder where the launcher will keep game builds, mods, soundpacks, tilesets and its local repository metadata.
messages.repository.setup.rule.emptyFolder: An empty folder will be initialized automatically.
messages.repository.setup.rule.nonEmptyFolder.pre: A non-empty folder is accepted only when it already contains a valid
messages.repository.setup.rule.persistedPath: The selected path is stored in the launcher profile and survives app updates.
messages.repository.loading.title: Loading repository
messages.repository.ready.title: CDDA Launcher
messages.repository.ready.description: Local repository has been validated. Version discovery can be connected next.
messages.updater.description.checking: Looking for a newer launcher version.
messages.updater.description.available: The update will be downloaded automatically.
messages.updater.description.downloaded: Restart the app to install it now, or continue working and install later.
messages.updater.error.packagedOnly: Real update check is available only in packaged app.
messages.updater.error.metadataMissing: Update metadata is missing in the latest GitHub release.
messages.updater.error.checkFailed: Cannot check for updates right now. Please try again later.
messages.settings.title: Settings
messages.settings.appearance.title: Appearance
messages.settings.appearance.description: Language and theme changes are applied immediately.
messages.settings.game.title: Game
messages.settings.content.title: Content
messages.settings.content.description: Future modpack, mod, soundpack and tileset entry points.
messages.settings.backups.title: Backups
messages.settings.backups.description: Future backup defaults for game updates and worlds.
messages.settings.advanced.title: Advanced
messages.settings.advanced.description: Maintenance actions for repository, logs and localization diagnostics.
messages.contentSheet.mods.title: Mods
messages.contentSheet.mods.description: Future mod manager for the selected game build.
messages.contentSheet.soundpack.title: Soundpack
messages.contentSheet.tileset.title: Tileset
messages.contentSheet.library.title: Library
messages.contentSheet.placeholder.title: UI placeholder
messages.contentSheet.placeholder.description: Business logic is not connected yet. This sidebar locks in the future interface structure.
messages.contentSheet.selection.title: Current selection
messages.contentSheet.selection.description: The selected item, its status and quick actions will appear here later.
messages.dock.status.tooltip.uiOnly: The status dot is reserved for game installation/update health. It is neutral while game business logic is not connected.
messages.dock.status.tooltip.repositoryMissing: Select a local repository before choosing a game channel.
messages.home.description: Game actions are scoped to the selected fork and channel. Mods, tilesets, soundpacks and backups will be stored separately for this installation profile.
messages.home.install.title: Installation is not connected yet
messages.home.install.description: The main screen is ready for the future update/install pipeline, but downloading and unpacking are intentionally disabled for now.
messages.home.card.installation.title: Installation
messages.home.card.installation.description: Separate game directory for the selected fork and channel.
messages.home.card.world.title: Last world
messages.home.card.world.description: Quick continue target after save discovery is connected.
messages.home.card.backups.title: Backups
messages.home.card.backups.description: Manual world backup and latest backup restore entry points.
